heading: Acquisition of property by lease
label: 297 Acquisition of property by lease
text: The authority granted to acquire sites and buildings by purchase or otherwise shall include authority to acquire leaseholds.
notes: Amendments1977— struck out “of not less than ten years” after “acquire leaseholds”.Pub. L. 95–1051952—Act , provided for leaseholds of not less than 10 years.June 19, 1952
amendments: Amendments1977— struck out “of not less than ten years” after “acquire leaseholds”.Pub. L. 95–1051952—Act , provided for leaseholds of not less than 10 years.June 19, 1952
